name: Giffer
shortDescription: Free open-source tool for turning image sequences or a single video into GIF or MOV with live preview and frame controls.
aiDescription: Giffer is a hybrid web and desktop creative tool from YCSWU for converting image sequences or a single video into GIF or MOV. It supports frame reordering, delay control, frame skipping, live preview, crop and frame presets, transform controls, PNG stacking, video trim, ZIP export of extracted video frames, and Windows desktop packaging.
creator: Ali Guzel
useCases: Turn image sequences into GIF or MOV
Convert a single video into a frame-based GIF workflow
Crop and frame short motion assets for square, landscape, or vertical output
Export extracted video frames as ZIP for manual review
systemRequirements: Modern browser with WebAssembly support for the web build
Windows 10 or later for the packaged desktop build
Enough memory for large image sequences or ffmpeg-based video extraction

changelog.summary: Current public codebase with web and Windows builds, live preview, image and video import, frame controls, crop and frame tools, ZIP export, branding, drag-reorder, and mirror loop.
